headings.usage: Use for timer digits, section headers, and primary CTAs. Tight letter spacing.

body.usage: Use for task descriptions, tags, and secondary text.

visual_enhancers.borders: Thick 2px-4px solid borders on all cards, buttons, and inputs.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Hard offset shadows: shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] in light mode, shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(255,255,255,1)] in dark mode.
visual_enhancers.border_radius: Subtle roundness (rounded-lg) combined with harsh shadows.
visual_enhancers.hover_states: Interactive elements should translate down and right (translate-x-[2px] translate-y-[2px]) and reduce shadow offset to simulate physical pressing.

layout.grid: Asymmetric Bento Grid. Use varying col-spans and row-spans.
layout.spacing: Generous spacing. p-6 or p-8 inside cards to prevent text from touching thick borders. gap-6 or gap-8 between grid items.
layout.timer_visualization: The active timer must be the dominant hero element. Use massive typography (text-6xl+ or fluid clamp) and a bold, contrasting background card (e.g., Hot Pink or Cyber Yellow). Consider a visual shrinking progress bar that wraps the card.

components.task_card: Solid color block (based on priority/status) with hard black/white borders. Interactive drag handle.
components.timer: Massive numeric display, distinct Play/Pause buttons with 'Gumroad' style hard shadows.
components.progress_dashboard: Chunky progress bars with thick outlines, large bold percentages.
components.modal: High contrast overlay (backdrop-blur with dark tint), modal window with thick border and offset shadow.

media.description: 3D abstract yellow and pink shapes for 'No tasks today' empty state illustration.
Avatar for the user profile section in the header.

accessibility.contrast: Extremely high contrast by default due to Neo-Brutalist borders and stark text colors.
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion for the timer shrinking animations.

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, drag handles, timer controls) MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a robust offline sync mechanism using IndexedDB or localStorage, syncing with MongoDB when the navigator is online.

Build the UI using pure Tailwind classes for the Neo-Brutalist look. Override Shadcn component styles heavily to remove their default soft shadows and rounded edges, replacing them with border-2 border-black (or border-white in dark mode) and offset shadows like shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)].
Use @hello-pangea/dnd or similar for drag-and-drop task reordering.
The active timer should be a prominent, large widget that stays visible. Include options to switch between Countdown, Pomodoro (25/5), and Stopwatch modes.
Use 'lucide-react' for bold, clear icons with thicker stroke-width if possible.
Implement a strict Dark Mode toggle that swaps the background to #0A0A0A, text to #FDFBF7, and border/shadows to white/light grey, while keeping the vibrant accent colors.
